title: polypodium excavatum var. loriforme
intro: Polypodium excavatum var. loriforme, also known as the Southern Polypody or Rock Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Polypodium excavatum var. loriforme include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional folk medicine.
